input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.10.2.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.10.2.1
            TITLE: where the exhaust has more than one exhaust outlet:

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.10.2.1: Where the Exhaust has more than one Exhaust Outlet:
IN.10.2.1 Where the Exhaust has more than one Exhaust Outlet: 
a. The noise test is repeated for each outlet  
b. The highest sound level is used

final_answer: rule IN.10.2.1: Where the Exhaust has more than one Exhaust Outlet: IN.10.2.1 Where the Exhaust has more than one Exhaust Outlet: a. The noise test is repeated for each outlet b. The highest sound level is used
